title: cyclodium acrostichoides
intro: Cyclodium acrostichoides, also known as the leather fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclodium acrostichoides include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyclodium acrostichoides are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
